overall.description: A first-person perspective video game scene depicting a flooded urban plaza resembling Berlin, featuring the Brandenburg Gate surrounded by modern and historic buildings. The player navigates through murky water past large mysterious rock formations before entering a narrow canyon-like passage between towering rocks, all rendered in a stylized desaturated aesthetic with overcast lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded historic plaza with scattered monolithic rocks

events.description: brandenburg gate monument comes into view in the distance ahead
turning toward the narrow passage entrance between rock formations

agents.ego_description: piloting a small watercraft through the flooded city square, maneuvering around large rocks and historic architecture

entered.detail: multi-story glass and concrete office building with grid windows
long stone facade building with classical architecture and columns
iconic neoclassical monument with tall columns and quadriga statue on top
large dark angular rocks emerging from the flood water throughout the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide flooded urban plaza with overcast skies. The camera moves through murky water surrounded by a mix of modern office buildings and historic stone architecture. The Brandenburg Gate monument becomes visible ahead, serving as a central landmark. Large mysterious rock formations protrude from the water throughout the plaza as the camera circles around, eventually turning toward a narrow passage between the rocks.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow flooded canyon between towering rock walls

events.description: entering narrow rock canyon corridor from the open plaza
red abandoned vehicle becomes visible in the distance down the canyon

agents.ego_description: navigating through the tight water passage between high rock walls, moving steadily forward toward a distant red object

entered.detail: tall dark angular rock wall forming the left side of the narrow canyon
tall dark angular rock wall forming the right side of the narrow canyon
red car or bus partially submerged in water visible in the distant canyon

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow flooded canyon with towering rock walls on both sides that block much of the sky. The camera moves steadily forward through the confined water passage, leaving the open plaza and its buildings behind. The environment becomes increasingly enclosed as the camera progresses deeper into the canyon, where a distant red abandoned vehicle becomes visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, flooded urban plaza into a claustrophobic rock canyon. It begins by gliding through murky water amidst a blend of modern office buildings and historic stone architecture, with the Brandenburg Gate serving as a central landmark. As the camera circles through the plaza, it passes large, mysterious rock formations before turning away from the open city toward a narrow gap in the stone. The scene then shifts into a confined flooded canyon where towering rock walls rise on both sides to block out the overcast sky. The environment becomes increasingly enclosed as the camera moves steadily forward, leaving the urban landscape behind and approaching a distant, abandoned red vehicle.
